user.title: LG ThinQ Dryer
user.description: Generate a Personal Access Token at https://connect-pat.lgthinq.com and paste it below. Country code uses 2-letter ISO format (e.g. DK, DE, US). The client_id is auto-generated if left blank.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LG ThinQ. Check your PAT and country code.
error.no_dryer_found: No washer/dryer devices found on the account.

delay_end.name: Delay end
delay_end.description: Tell the dryer to be done in N hours.

delay_start.name: Delay start
delay_start.description: Tell the dryer to start in N hours (model-dependent).
